name: stellar-lens-monorepo
description: Developer SDK for the Stellar network - Soroban transaction pre-flight simulation, smart RPC routing with automatic latency-ranked fallback, and human-readable XDR error decoding. Monorepo containing the TypeScript SDK (stellar-lens), web demo, and VS Code extension, with planned ports to Python, Go, and Rust/WASM.
author: Ezedike-Evan <egwomevan323@gmail.com>
